title: Spectrum Shift
description: At the start of your turn, add [blue]1[/blue] random Colorless card into your [gold]Hand[/gold].
smart_description: At the start of your turn, add [blue]1[/blue] random Colorless card for each stack into your [gold]Hand[/gold].
notes: This power uses Counter stacking. Each additional stack adds one more card to your hand at the start of turn.
